title: The Burgundy Room
intro: 1974. Back office. Sunrise in a few hours. The owner vanished with the combination — and somebody's coming back for the safe.

items.title: Blue matchbook
items.description: Front: 'Lady Soul'. Back: a phone number scribbled out.

items.title: Black matchbook
items.description: Front: 'Papa Was a Rolling Stone'. Back: 'last call, 72'.

items.title: Framed photo
items.description: Gunn in the corner, 71. Heavy frame. Numbers etched on the back: 12-24-08-30.

items.title: Ledger scrap (top)
items.description: ...owed Pony three large since 73, vault still says no...

items.title: Ledger scrap (mid)
items.description: ...combination's in plain sight if you knew where to look — Otis, then the year he died...

items.title: Safe key
items.description: Small. Worn bow. Fits the back door.

puzzles.title: Jukebox panel
puzzles.prompt: Punch in the running order. The matchbooks know it — earliest year first.
puzzles.reward_message: The selector clacks. A cabinet key drops from underneath.

puzzles.title: Liquor cabinet
puzzles.prompt: The cabinet opens. Behind the green Chartreuse, a framed photo.
revelations: You ease the cabinet door open. It smells like old paper and worse spirits.
Behind the Chartreuse: a small frame. You take it out and turn it over.

puzzles.title: Safe behind the portrait
puzzles.prompt: The portrait swings out. Four-wheel dial. Set the numbers from the photo.
puzzles.reward_message: The vault opens. A small key inside, and a stack of bills you don't touch.

interactables.label: Matchbook on the desk
interactables.narrative: Blue matchbook. Lady Soul. You pocket it.

interactables.label: Ledger scrap (drawer)
interactables.narrative: A torn ledger page in the top drawer.

interactables.label: Matchbook by the stage
interactables.narrative: Black matchbook beneath the stage edge.

interactables.label: Ledger scrap (under the rug)
interactables.narrative: You lift the rug. Another scrap.

interactables.label: Jukebox
interactables.narrative: The jukebox is warm and humming. A keypad on the front.

interactables.label: Liquor cabinet
interactables.narrative: The cabinet door rattles. Use the key?

interactables.label: Portrait of the owner
interactables.narrative: The portrait pivots on a hinge. A safe behind it.

interactables.label: Back door
interactables.narrative: You fit the key. The deadbolt turns. Daylight crawls in.

opening_narrative: You wake on the carpet. Velvet wallpaper. Something is humming through the wall.
Hint: walk close to anything interesting and press E to interact.
Find the matchbooks — there's a code on the backs.
